title: Adrenal Support | 16 oz
body_html:
This powerhouse tonic was formulated to improve adrenal function and combat adrenal fatigue while gently supporting the entire endocrine system. Symptoms of adrenal fatigue can include sluggishness, lack of focus, low energy, and imbalanced mood. We included ingredients that can help combat fatigue, lower cortisol, increase focus, and alleviate stress.

Since this product can help the body and mind to become more alert and focused, we recommend taking our Adrenal Support earlier in the day, at least before noon, to receive the most benefits and as not to impact sleep.

This product is recommended for ages 12 and older. We do not recommend using while pregnant or breastfeeding unless otherwise directed by your trusted healthcare provider.



For more product information or questions on products, please join our VIP group on Facebook.

title: After Sun Balm | 4 oz
body_html:
This restorative and soothing balm is a must-have after too much fun in the sun. Our After Sun Balm provides quick relief for sunburned and chapped skin, calming the sting and heat that comes with overexposure to the sun. As it locks in moisture and soothes irritated skin, it can also help aid in minimizing itching and peeling associated with burns. It also can be used for quick relief from burns from ovens, curling irons, and more and offers relief for blisters.

body_html:
A nice hot bath is one of the best ways to help you unwind and de-stress from your day. But what if, in addition to relaxing and pampering yourself, you could also experience numerous health benefits too?

We developed six, all-natural therapeutic bath bomb powders for you to scoop into your bath to help reduce inflammation, eliminate toxins, soothe and relieve dry and itchy skin, and balance your skin’s natural pH levels while soaking in a relaxing bath.

TO USE: Add 3-4 scoops into a hot bath and enjoy!

 

WELLNESS

INGREDIENTS: SODIUM BICARBONATE (BAKING SODA), CITRIC ACID, SEA SALT, ORGANIC COCONUT OIL, SHEA BUTTER, ORGANIC SUNFLOWER OIL, ORGANIC ARROWROOT POWDER, KAOLIN CLAY, CREAM OF TARTAR, WITCH HAZEL, CURCUMA LONGA (ORGANIC TURMERIC POWDER), 100% PURE THERAPEUTIC GRADE ESSENTIAL OILS: CLOVE, LEMON, CINNAMON BARK, EUCALYPTUS, ROSEMARY.

title: Beeswax Candle | 8.75 oz
body_html:
Our toxin free candles are formulated with beeswax and are infused with 100% pure, therapeutic grade essential oils. Featuring an organic hemp wick, you and your family can enjoy the cozy ambiance without worrying about false fragrance, petroleum, and other toxic, harmful ingredients. 

Unscented - Enjoy the cozy and calm ambiance of this unscented option.

INGREDIENTS: ORGANIC COCONUT OIL, ORGANIC BEESWAX.

Peppermint + Cypress -  Refreshing, invigorating, and crisp.

INGREDIENTS: ORGANIC COCONUT OIL, ORGANIC BEESWAX, 100% PURE THERAPEUTIC GRADE ESSENTIAL OILS: PEPPERMINT, CYPRESS.

Pumpkin Spice - This seasonal, limited-edition candle offers a sweet, warm, and spicy scent.

INGREDIENTS: ORGANIC COCONUT OIL, ORGANIC BEESWAX, 100% PURE THERAPEUTIC GRADE ESSENTIAL OILS: CLOVE, CASSIA, NUTMEG, BERGAMOT.

Christmas Cheer -   This seasonal, limited-edition candle offers the warm and cozy scents of cinnamon, orange, and spruce.

INGREDIENTS: ORGANIC COCONUT OIL, ORGANIC BEESWAX, 100% PURE THERAPEUTIC GRADE ESSENTIAL OILS: CINNAMON, CASSIA.

TO USE: Light the wick & let the candle burn until the wax melts out to the edges of the jar. Ideally, 2-4 hours is recommended for first use. Extinguishing too early may lead to the formation of a tunnel which may decrease the overall burn time. Burn time is approximately 35+ hours.

*Note: Extensive research went into formulating our scented candles and careful consideration in selecting scents from our 100% pure, therapeutic grade essential oils to ensure that our candles are completely safe to burn. 

⚠️ WARNING: KEEP CANDLE FREE OF DEBRIS. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN AND PETS. NEVER LEAVE A BURNING CANDLE UNATTENDED.

title: Elderberry Immune Support | 3 pack
body_html:
Prevent and combat sickness and seasonal allergies for the whole family when you stock up on our super powerful immune boosting tonic!

Bundle Includes:

(3) Organic Elderberry Immune Support | 16 oz - Your choice of Regular or Honey Free.

 

 

Elderberries are the second highest antioxidant fruit and have powerful immune boosting, anti-inflammatory effects. Antioxidants help fight free radicals in our bodies by stopping them from forming harmful groups that destroy healthy cells.

By adding antioxidant rich vitamin C and anti-inflammatory herbs alongside our elderberries, this multi-functional tonic has proven successful in preventing and combating sickness and seasonal allergies.

 

TO USE: Shake well. Adults take 1–2 tablespoons daily. Children (ages 1+) take 1–2 teaspoons daily. At the onset of symptoms or exposure to illness, take every 2–3 hours. (Children under the age of 1 should not ingest honey.) After opening, refrigerate and use within 2–3 months.


REGULAR ELDERBERRY

INGREDIENTS: PURIFIED WATER, ORGANIC DRIED ELDERBERRIES, RAW HONEY, ORGANIC LEMON JUICE, ORGANIC GINGER ROOT POWDER, ORGANIC VITAMIN C (L-ASCORBIC ACID), ORGANIC CINNAMON POWDER, ORGANIC CLOVE POWDER

HONEY-FREE ELDERBERRY

INGREDIENTS: PURIFIED WATER, ORGANIC DRIED ELDERBERRIES, ORGANIC LEMON JUICE, ORGANIC GINGER ROOT POWDER, ORGANIC STEVIA, ORGANIC VITAMIN C (L-ASCORBIC ACID), ORGANIC CLOVE POWDER, ORGANIC CINNAMON POWDER.
*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food & Drug Administration (FDA) and are not intended to diagnose, treat, or cure any disease.
*Always check with your doctor before using a new product or supplement if you have any questions or concerns about how a product may affect your current health, medications, pregnancy, or breastfeeding.
For more product information or questions on products, please join our VIP group on Facebook.

body_html:

TO USE: Plug in diffuser. Lift off the lid and add up to 300ml of water inside using the provided measuring cup. Drop in the desired amount of your favorite Rowe Casa Essential Oils. Put the lid back on. Press "mist/timer" button to select mist mode option (Continuous/ 10s intermittent/ 2H  / 4H). If you would like to use the light feature, press the light button and choose one of the 7 different LED light color options.

Additional Information: Ultrasonic Aromatherapy & Humidifier. Auto-Off Safety Switch That Prevents Overheating When Water Runs Out. Approximately 8 hour run time. 3.75" H x 4.5" D

title: Mask Refresher Drops | 10 ml
body_html:
Unique times call for unique solutions. So many of us are mandated to wear masks whenever we go out, whether it’s for a half hour or all day long. Regardless of your opinion on masks, we can all agree it’s not ideal, and there are three leading concerns we hear about when it comes to wearing masks for long periods of time: respiratory restriction, anxiety, and bacteria accumulation.

To combat these concerns, we’ve created three types of drops to help you continue breathe well, keep you calm, and protect your immunity. These ingredients are methodically blended to help skin irritations that can occur and truly help take the pain out of wearing a mask!

TO USE: Shake well. Place 4-5 drops on the inside center of mask before wearing, reapply as often as needed.

BREATHE

INGREDIENTS: DISTILLED WATER, FRACTIONATED COCONUT OIL, WITCH HAZEL, COLLOIDAL SILVER, 100% PURE THERAPEUTIC GRADE ESSENTIAL OILS: RAVINTSARA, LEMON, WINTERGREEN, PEPPERMINT, EUCALYPTUS, MYRTLE, MARJORAM, LAVENDER, CYPRESS, BLACK SPRUCE.

CALM

INGREDIENTS: DISTILLED WATER, FRACTIONATED COCONUT OIL, WITCH HAZEL, COLLOIDAL SILVER, 100% PURE THERAPEUTIC GRADE ESSENTIAL OILS: ORANGE, LAVENDER, TANGERINE, YLANG YLANG, PATCHOULI, BLUE TANSY.

PROTECT

INGREDIENTS: DISTILLED WATER, FRACTIONATED COCONUT OIL, WITCH HAZEL, COLLOIDAL SILVER, 100% PURE THERAPEUTIC GRADE ESSENTIAL OILS: LEMON, CLOVE, CINNAMON, EUCALYPTUS, ROSEMARY.

title: P-boost | 10 ml
body_html:
1 in 2 women has experienced the symptoms of hormonal imbalance. Hormones play a critical role in ensuring your body functions properly. Even a slight imbalance in your hormone levels could lead to your body getting “out of whack.” This power-packed blend offers a natural way to balance your hormones and bring needed support to your progesterone levels.

P-Boost is a natural remedy to hormonal imbalance.

This organic solution is ideal for females who experience:

  • irregular cycles
  • long or painful periods
  • chronic bloating
  • chronic fatigue

P-Boost is also effective in relieving your symptoms if you’re pre-menopausal or menopausal. They are especially helpful if you have had a partial or full hysterectomy or damaged ovaries due to chemotherapy or radiation. These are some of the many reasons it’s one of our top ten products.

With your body’s hormonal balance restored, you will feel rejuvenated. Not only that but your other bodily functions will be restored as well. These are functions such as your:

  • metabolism and appetite
  • heart rate
  • sleep cycles
  • reproductive cycles and sexual function
  • mood and stress levels
For more product information or questions on products, please join our VIP group on Facebook.

title: SUMMER DEAL - SWIM SPRAY | 8 oz
body_html:
This spray neutralizes chlorine and protects skin and hair from chlorinated pool or water exposure. Sodium ascorbate (a form of vitamin C) is the super star in this spray, as it helps to change chlorine to an unharmful compound that can be easily rinsed from the skin and hair. This helps to prevent and relieve possible effects of chlorine exposure such as itching, burning, and dryness. ⠀⠀

Chlorine naturally reacts with organic compounds that are already present in water, creating harmful and toxic disinfection byproducts (DBPs) such as trihalomethanes (THMs). THMs can be even more concentrated when absorbed through the skin, possibly contributing to health risks that can affect the heart, nervous system, and can be linked to cancer.

¹1- Hood E. (2005). Tap Water and Trihalomethanes: Flow of Concerns Continues. Environmental Health Perspectives, 113(7), A474.

For more product information or questions on products, please join our VIP group on Facebook.

title: Swim Spray | 8 oz
body_html:
This spray neutralizes chlorine and protects skin and hair from chlorinated pool or water exposure. Sodium ascorbate (a form of vitamin C) is the super star in this spray, as it helps to change chlorine to an unharmful compound that can be easily rinsed from the skin and hair. This helps to prevent and relieve possible effects of chlorine exposure such as itching, burning, and dryness. ⠀⠀

Chlorine naturally reacts with organic compounds that are already present in water, creating harmful and toxic disinfection byproducts (DBPs) such as trihalomethanes (THMs). THMs can be even more concentrated when absorbed through the skin, possibly contributing to health risks that can affect the heart, nervous system, and can be linked to cancer.

¹1- Hood E. (2005). Tap Water and Trihalomethanes: Flow of Concerns Continues. Environmental Health Perspectives, 113(7), A474.

title: T-balance | 10 ml
body_html:
Both men and women need healthy levels of testosterone to feel strong and have the energy needed to live their best life.

The oils used in this T-Balance Blend were chosen for their balancing properties to help your body maintain healthy levels of testosterone.

Signs that men may be low in testosterone include low semen count, decreased sex drive, reduced muscle mass, hair loss, lack of energy, and increased body fat. Signs of high testosterone in males are acne, aggressive or risk-taking behaviors, excessive body hair, headaches, high blood pressure, high libido, increased appetite.

Signs women may be low in testosterone include fatigue, feeling sluggish, low sex drive, sleep disturbances, and fertility issues. Signs of high testosterone in women are: acne, deep voice, excess hair on the face and body, increased muscle mass, irregular periods, loss of libido, irritability, thinning hair. Women with PCOS have high testosterone levels.

For more product information or questions on products, please join our VIP group on Facebook.

body_html:
Testosterone balance is an important factor when it comes to overall wellness. T-Balance is crafted with 100% therapeutic grade essential oils that contain balancing properties that support the body in maintaining healthy levels of testosterone. 

For women, high testosterone can be associated with issues such as blemishes, deeper voice, excess hair growth, fertility issues, irregular periods, loss of sex drive, irritability, and hair loss. Low testosterone levels can be associated with fatigue, low sex drive, sleep disturbances, and fertility issues.

For men, low testosterone can be associated with lower semen count, decreased sex drive, lower muscle mass, hair loss, lack of energy, and weight gain. High testosterone levels can be associated with blemishes, aggressive behavior, high blood pressure, and increased appetite.

body_html:
Do you want whiter teeth without using harmful chemicals? Then our natural whitener could be for you!

Activated charcoal’s absorbent nature has been referenced in medical literature for centuries and gained popularity for its ability to bind to toxins and help expel them from the body. Combined with the bacteria-fighting benefits of coconut oil and the stain-eliminating effects of baking soda, this paste is a great natural option for keeping your teeth bright and pearly white.

INGREDIENTS: CERTIFIED PURE ACTIVATED COCONUT SHELL CHARCOAL, ORGANIC FRACTIONATED COCONUT OIL, BENTONITE CLAY, BAKING SODA, ORGANIC STEVIA, 100% PURE THERAPEUTIC GRADE ESSENTIAL OIL: SPEARMINT.

title: Vitamin C Bath Powder | 13 oz
body_html:
This bath powder neutralizes chlorine and protects skin and hair from chlorinated water exposure. Sodium ascorbate (a form of vitamin C) is the superstar in this bath powder, as it helps neutralize chlorine to avoid its harmful effects on skin and hair. This helps to prevent and relieve possible effects of chlorine exposure such as itching, burning, and dryness.

Chlorine naturally reacts with organic compounds that are already present in water, creating harmful and toxic  disinfection byproducts (DBPs) such as trihalomethanes (THMs). THMs can be even more concentrated when absorbed through the skin, possibly contributing to health risks that can affect the heart, nervous system, and can be linked to cancer.

¹1- Hood E. (2005). Tap Water and Trihalomethanes: Flow of Concerns Continues. Environmental Health Perspectives, 113(7), A474.

title: Women's Hormone Kit
body_html:
Balanced hormones are an important factor in our overall health and wellbeing. Supporting balanced hormones is key for mental and physical health, mood, energy, and so much more. There are many factors that may disrupt our endocrine system and cause imbalance. 

The Hormone Kit includes four unique blends to help bring balance to key hormones so that you can thrive. Each blend is formulated with 100% pure, therapeutic grade essential oils that contain properties to help support, balance, and regulate essential hormones. Inside of your kit, you will find an insert that contains detailed instructions on how to use these best-selling blends to help support your body’s needs. 

T-Balance 

Low testosterone in women may contribute to fatigue, low sex drive, and fertility problems. Too much testosterone may cause irregular periods, acne, thinning hair, and excess hair on the face and body. T-Balance can help maintain testosterone at healthy, optimal levels in women. 

E-Balance

Lack of estrogen in women can directly impact their body’s ability to ovulate. E-Balance helps to regulate high or low estrogen levels to a healthy, balanced level to prevent the problems associated with estrogen imbalance such as weight gain, irritation, insomnia, depression, bloating, and more. 

Thyroid + Adrenal Support

Thyroid + Adrenal Support is formulated to support optimal functioning of your thyroid and adrenal glands. These glands are responsible for producing essential hormones. 

P-Boost 

P-Boost is our solution for an all-natural progesterone support. Healthy progesterone levels can help remedy a host of issues such as irregular cycles, long or painful periods, and chronic bloating and fatigue. Our natural remedy for progesterone imbalance combines 100% pure, therapeutic grade essential oils with the support of natural, bioidentical progesterone derived from wild yam. 

Kit Includes:

 

E-Balance | 10 ml
P-Boost | 10 ml
T-Balance | 10 ml
Thyroid + Adrenal | 10 ml
